name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Session 54 shipped the remaining high-impact repo-side launch/refinement tranche: session-flow bookkeeping is now extracted out of `App.jsx`, Run History can launch seeded rematches directly, and launch/readiness commands now report raster-asset and telemetry status in-repo. The remaining milestone work is owner-side launch execution plus live measurement, not missing plumbing.
nextMilestone: Owner-side finish line: add `VITE_POSTHOG_KEY`/`VITE_SENTRY_DSN`, capture production Lighthouse LCP/CLS and `home_v2_deploy` funnel deltas, run real-device QA, publish the Itch.io listing with the new PNG launch assets, then observe post-launch replay/trust/balance signals.
